sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34782" key="e)/nakmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔνακμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n34782.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐν ἀκμῇ</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in full bloom</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strength</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
